segments.voice_english: Fans always debate the GOAT, because Lionel Messi versus Cristiano Ronaldo has never happened in a World Cup match.
segments.subtitle_english: Fans always debate the GOAT, because Lionel Messi versus Cristiano Ronaldo has never happened in a World Cup match.
segments.voice_hindi: प्रशंसक हमेशा GOAT पर बहस करते हैं, क्योंकि विश्व कप मैच में लियोनेल मेस्सी बनाम क्रिस्टियानो रोनाल्डो कभी नहीं हुआ है।

segments.voice_english: Cristiano Ronaldo spoke about the 2026 World Cup, when he claimed a potential Portugal versus Argentina clash would be top.
segments.image_query: Cristiano Ronaldo Portugal national football team
segments.subtitle_english: Cristiano Ronaldo spoke about the 2026 World Cup, when he claimed a potential Portugal versus Argentina clash would be top.
segments.voice_hindi: क्रिस्टियानो रोनाल्डो ने 2026 विश्व कप के बारे में बात की, जब उन्होंने दावा किया कि पुर्तगाल बनाम अर्जेंटीना का संभावित मुकाबला शीर्ष पर होगा।

segments.voice_english: Fake rumors claimed Jude Bellingham insulted Messi during a match, but journalists proved this viral World Cup story was totally untrue.
segments.subtitle_english: Fake rumors claimed Jude Bellingham insulted Messi during a match, but journalists proved this viral World Cup story was totally untrue.
segments.voice_hindi: फर्जी अफवाहों में दावा किया गया कि जूड बेलिंगहैम ने एक मैच के दौरान मेसी का अपमान किया, लेकिन पत्रकारों ने साबित कर दिया कि विश्व कप की यह वायरल कहानी पूरी तरह से झूठी थी।

segments.voice_english: Experts compared their World Cup knockout statistics, so fans could finally decide who performs best under extreme pressure.
segments.subtitle_english: Experts compared their World Cup knockout statistics, so fans could finally decide who performs best under extreme pressure.
segments.voice_hindi: विशेषज्ञों ने उनके विश्व कप नॉकआउट आंकड़ों की तुलना की, ताकि प्रशंसक अंततः यह तय कर सकें कि अत्यधिक दबाव में कौन सर्वश्रेष्ठ प्रदर्शन करता है।

segments.voice_english: Both legends will try to reach the finals, after they start their last tournament with the ultimate trophy on the line.

segments.subtitle_english: Both legends will try to reach the finals, after they start their last tournament with the ultimate trophy on the line.
segments.voice_hindi: अंतिम ट्रॉफी के साथ अपना आखिरी टूर्नामेंट शुरू करने के बाद, दोनों दिग्गज फाइनल में पहुंचने की कोशिश करेंगे।

data.description: Kya Messi aur Ronaldo ka ultimate clash World Cup 2026 mein hoga? 🏆 CR7 ne is potential Argentina vs Portugal match par ek bada statement diya hai! Saath hi, Jude Bellingham aur Messi ke viral rumor ka sach bhi jaan lo. Kya aapko lagta hai ye dream match kabhi sach hoga? Comment mein batao! 👇

data.description: Spain vs Argentina ka World Cup final toh blockbuster hoga, par kya aapko ticket ka price pata hai? 🤯 Ek ticket pure Rs 27 Lakh ki bik rahi hai, jisne ise America ka sabse mehenga sports event bana diya hai! Saath me Shakira aur Burna Boy halftime show me aag lagane ke liye ready hain. Kya aap ek match ke liye itne paise kharch karenge? Comment me batao! 👇
